comments: Five tracks are played in Lie Back And Enjoy It.
Vance plays a record of his own choice

sessions.details: one and only sesssion (rpt). Recorded: 1987-04-10. Available on Battlescarred, remastered re-issue (Marquee). "You can hear what Blood Money are up to these days by visiting https://www.reverbnation.com/morgueazmicmusic. There are soon to be re-releases of both the Blood Money albums on black and coloured vinyl! We will keep this page and our FaceBook/Reverb Nation pages up to date with details! Enjoy, Take Care and KEEP ROCKIN!!! All the best... Blood Money."
